cells.rationale: New routing policy, adversarial parsing, concurrency, privacy, and worker lifecycle create subtle correctness and security invariants across multiple boundaries.
Exact argv and environment composition across every launch path is a correctness-critical architectural cascade with ambiguous handoff failure semantics.
Untrusted hook input, a forward-only schema change, and deterministic event folding form a security- and correctness-critical contract.
Removing profile infrastructure without breaking instruction guards, settings seeding, shared history, or credential containment is a cross-cutting architectural refactor.
The retirement path is fully specified and largely mechanical, but spans public CLI contracts, daemon supervision, workers, modules, and tests.
A destructive forward-only migration that must preserve historical re-fold safety and unrelated projections carries subtle schema correctness invariants.
This is well-specified multi-file documentation pruning with semantic consistency and lint constraints but no novel design requirement.
